title: Senegalia ricoae

The genus Senegalia is often included in the broader genus Acacia, but some sources consider them to be distinct. Senegalia ricoae is a relatively rare and little-studied species, which can make its classification and distribution less well understood. The classification of Senegalia ricoae reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Fabaceae family.
